_comment: P2-006: every first-party contract declares its expected gatekeeper outcome — verdict plus the exact set of ERROR check ids (warnings may evolve with new checks; errors may not drift silently). scripts/validate-all.mjs enforces this in CI; adding a contract without an entry here fails the build.

hrx7._why: historical model predates the v2.1 explode-coverage gate (69 % < 80 %); recorded honestly, gate unchanged

vx2-hornet._why: historical model predates the v2.1 explode-coverage gate (42 % < 80 %)
